title: Boaties left homeless by Tropical Cyclone Koji begin long rebuild

title: Tropical storm leaves 8 dead, thousands displaced in Philippines after flooding and landslide
description: A tropical storm set off flooding and a landslide in the southern Philippines, leaving at least eight people dead, displacing more than 28,000 and trapping residents in houses in two flooded villages, officials said Friday.

en: Tropical storm leaves 8 dead, thousands displaced in Philippines after flooding and landslide. A tropical storm set off flooding and a landslide in the southern Philippines, leaving at least eight people dead, displacing more than 28,000 and trapping residents in houses in two flooded villages, officials said Friday.

title: Global warming drives an increase in pre-monsoon tropical cyclone activity over the North Indian Ocean
description: Pre-monsoon tropical cyclones are particularly devastating in the North Indian Ocean. Global warming is increasing their activity, a trend likely to continue and raise risks for vulnerable coastal communities.
content:
• Fritz, H. et al. Cyclone Nargis storm surge in Myanmar. Nat. Geosci.2, 448449 (2009). Google Scholar 
  • Elsberry, R. L., Jordan, M. S. & Vitart, F. Predictability of tropical cyclone… [+6070 chars]
de: Die globale Erwärmung führt zu einem Anstieg der Aktivität tropischer Wirbelstürme vor dem Monsun über dem Nordindischen Ozean. Tropische Wirbelstürme vor dem Monsun sind im Nordindischen Ozean besonders verheerend. Die globale Erwärmung erhöht ihre Aktivität, ein Trend, der sich wahrscheinlich fortsetzen und die Risiken für gefährdete Küstengemeinden erhöhen wird.
en: Global warming drives an increase in pre-monsoon tropical cyclone activity over the North Indian Ocean. Pre-monsoon tropical cyclones are particularly devastating in the North Indian Ocean. Global warming is increasing their activity, a trend likely to continue and raise risks for vulnerable coastal communities.
la: Calefactio globalis auctum impellit in cyclo tropico pre-monsono per Oceanum Septentrionalem Indicum. Prae-monsoon cyclones tropicae maxime vastant in Oceano Indico septentrionali. Calefactionem cunctam activitatem suam auget, inclinatio verisimiliter perseverare et periculum facere pro communitatibus maritimarum vulnerabilibus.
